status_options.label: Prototype
status_options.description: Built or being explored, not necessarily live or maintained.

status_options.label: Maintenance
status_options.description: Live or useful enough to keep running, mostly upkeep and small fixes.

status_options.label: Paused
status_options.description: Not active right now, but still worth remembering and possibly reviving.

status_options.label: Archived
status_options.description: Worked on before, no current intention to return.

public_safety.rule: Only publish project metadata: name, one-line description, status, last touched date, tags, and intentional public links.

projects.name: Project Radar
projects.summary: Public-safe tracker for remembering prototypes, maintained apps, paused work, and archived projects.
projects.notes: Repo and custom domain are set up. Seed list still needs approval.
